Package org.eventb.internal.core.sc.symbolTable

Class SymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>,P extends ISymbolProblem>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.sc.symbolTable.AttributedSymbol
org.eventb.internal.core.sc.symbolTable.SymbolInfo<E,T,P>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<ISymbolInfo<?,?>>, IAttributedSymbol, ISymbolInfo<E,T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
IdentifierSymbolInfo, LabelSymbolInfo
public abstract class SymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>,P extends ISymbolProblem> extends AttributedSymbol implements ISymbolInfo<E,T>

  • Method Details

    • getSymbolType

      public T getSymbolType()
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolInfo
      Returns the element type of this symbol. This is the element type used when this symbol is made persistent using createSCElement().
      Specified by:
      getSymbolType in interface ISymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>>
      Returns:
      the element type of this symbol

    • isPersistent

      public boolean isPersistent()
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolInfo
      Returns whether the symbol is persistent. That is whether it can be serialized.
      Specified by:
      isPersistent in interface ISymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>>
      Returns:
      whether the symbol is persistent
      See Also:
      • ILabelSymbolInfo.createSCElement(IInternalElement, String, IProgressMonitor)
      • IIdentifierSymbolInfo.createSCElement(IInternalElement, IProgressMonitor)

    • hasError

      public final boolean hasError()
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolInfo
      Returns whether this symbol is erroneous.
      Specified by:
      hasError in interface ISymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>>
      Returns:
      true if the symbol is erroneous, false otherwise

    • setError

      public final void setError() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolInfo
      Marks this symbol as erroneous.
      Specified by:
      setError in interface ISymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>>
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if the symbol info is not mutable

    • isMutable

      public final boolean isMutable()
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolInfo
      Returns whether the symbol info is (still) mutable. The static checker can mark symbol infos as immutable: this removes the possibility to mark a symbol as erroneous.
      Specified by:
      isMutable in interface ISymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>>
      Returns:
      whether or not the symbol info is mutable.

    • makeImmutable

      public final void makeImmutable()
      Make this symbol info immutable. It cannot be made mutable again.
      Specified by:
      makeImmutable in interface ISymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>>

    • getSymbol

      public final String getSymbol()
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolInfo
      Returns the symbol string of this symbol info.
      Specified by:
      getSymbol in interface ISymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>>
      Returns:
      the symbol string

      name of the component that contains this symbol

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • getProblemElement

      public final IInternalElement getProblemElement()
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolInfo
      Returns an element to which to attach problem markers. This is not necessarily the source element from which the symbol was extracted.

      For example, a constant IConstant c of an Event-B context IContextFile C will be represented by an identifier symbol. In context C the element returned is the element IConstant c. In a context D that sees (ISeesContext s) context C the element returned for the identifier symbol is s.

      Specified by:
      getProblemElement in interface ISymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>>
      Returns:
      the element associated with this symbol info

    • createConflictMarker

      public final void createConflictMarker(IMarkerDisplay markerDisplay) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolInfo
      Creates a suitable marker for collisions in the symbol table.
      Specified by:
      createConflictMarker in interface ISymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>>
      Parameters:
      markerDisplay - a place to put the marker
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was problem creating the marker

    • getProblemAttributeType

      public final IAttributeType getProblemAttributeType()
      Description copied from interface: ISymbolInfo
      Returns an attribute to which to attach problem markers. See description of getProblemElement().

      The problem attribute returned may be null if there is none.

      Specified by:
      getProblemAttributeType in interface ISymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>>
      Returns:
      an attribute to which to attach problem markers, null if there is none
